rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in implementation scope when binding outputs to inputs via implementation-level features.
Ensure output dependencies in annexes use only visible ports or constants, not subcomponent paths.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by confining AGREE annexes to their valid scope (type or implementation) without introducing external dependencies.
Map requirement logic to visible features only, avoiding hidden subcomponent references in contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE blocks.
Express Boolean conditions using `>=`, `<=`, and logical operators (`and`, `or`, `not`) on typed ports.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions.
Avoid using subcomponent port names directly in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE type resolution for scalar names
